blockedReasons: Run matrix entry run-304 is stale; backlog items must be re-collected before triage.
boundary: Failure classifications and mutation backlog items are evidence and backlog inputs only, not automatic fixes. They are evidence inputs and remain review-gated until a reviewer triages them. No auto-fix, no auto-apply, and no hidden tasks. Browser read-only or draft-only.
